headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. H1 should be fluid text-5xl to text-7xl max. Elegant, spaced. NEVER use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and small text. Clean, modern, highly legible.

layout.grid_system: Bento grids for features, heavy use of asymmetrical layouts. Mobile-first stacked layout.

animations.scroll_behavior: Use Lenis for buttery smooth momentum scrolling. The scrolling must feel heavy, precise, and premium.
animations.reveal_pattern: Fade in and translate up (y: 40 to y: 0) on scroll using GSAP ScrollTrigger.
animations.sticky_scroll: For the Sticky Scroll Story: Create a 400vh container. Inside, a sticky top-0 100vh div. Use GSAP ScrollTrigger with scrub: 1 to crossfade the 5 iPhone screen images and their corresponding text captions as the user scrolls down the 400vh space. Apple-style precision.
animations.micro_interactions: Subtle scale-up on hover for cards (scale: 1.02), dimming siblings if possible.

components.iphone_mockup: Use pure CSS to create an ultra-premium iPhone bezel. classes: 'rounded-[3rem] border-[8px] border-[#171717] bg-[#0F0F0F] ring-1 ring-white/10 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative'. Insert app screenshot images inside this container. Add a CSS pill for the dynamic island at top-center.
components.glass_panels: For sticky headers or floating elements, use backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#171717]/60 with a 1px border-white/5.
components.buttons: App Store button placeholder should be an elegant #F0EDE8 background with #0F0F0F text, rounded-full, px-8 py-3. Hover: scale 0.98, background pure white.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
sections_breakdown.description: Large serif headline, elegant subtitle, primary CTA. A large CSS iPhone mockup centered, slightly tilted or straight, containing '01_dashboard.png'. A subtle green glow ('hero_glow' image) positioned absolutely behind the iPhone with heavy blur (e.g. blur-3xl opacity-20).

sections_breakdown.name: Social Proof
sections_breakdown.description: Horizontal strip displaying key stats (e.g., '1M+ Workouts Logged') with a delicate border-y border-white/5. Text fades in on scroll.

sections_breakdown.name: Sticky Scroll Story
sections_breakdown.description: 400vh container. Left/Right split on desktop, stacked on mobile. A sticky iPhone frame in the center/side. As scroll scrub progresses, opacity of texts on the side crossfades, and the image inside the iPhone transitions from 01 -> 02 -> 03 -> 04 -> 05.

sections_breakdown.name: Swipe Logging UX
sections_breakdown.description: A bento card highlighting the swipe logging feature. Dark card background (#171717) with the dark_metal texture overlaid at 10% opacity. Text describes the feature.

sections_breakdown.name: Progress & Analytics
sections_breakdown.description: Showcase of the '05_stats.png' inside a sleek container, bordered by white/5, emphasizing the premium data visualization.

sections_breakdown.name: Muscle Recovery
sections_breakdown.description: Editorial layout. Large serif number '03' followed by 'Recovery. Redefined.' Text block adjacent to a sleek visual or metric.

sections_breakdown.name: Workout Library
sections_breakdown.description: Grid of smaller cards or a carousel showing workout categories. Clean sans-serif typography for card titles.

sections_breakdown.name: Achievements
sections_breakdown.description: Minimalist grid showing abstract badge placeholders. Soft green accents for unlocked states.

sections_breakdown.name: Onboarding
sections_breakdown.description: Step-by-step text reveals. Use GSAP ScrollTrigger to highlight the current step (white text) while muting others (#9B9B9B).

sections_breakdown.name: Profile/Personalization
sections_breakdown.description: Dark sophisticated section showing how the app tailors to the user. '02_coach.png' highlighted.

sections_breakdown.name: Final CTA
sections_breakdown.description: Massive serif typography: 'Your peak awaits.' Soft green accent underline. App Store download button. High whitespace.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='download-app-hero'`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #9B9B9B against #0F0F0F passes WCAG AA for normal text. Avoid using the soft green #A3BCA7 for small text, use it for accents, borders, or large graphical text only.
